subject: GO: WS1.4 commit queue window
body:
Coordinator GO from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

All WS1.4 reviews are CLEAN/GO now: Hubble/type final CLEAN/GO, Ramanujan/assumptions CLEAN/GO, Rawls/test CLEAN/GO, plus Solar support CLEAN. Live state before route: no directed messages for me, cached staged set empty, active claims are yours, HEAD f36f98b1.

You have the WS1.4 commit window. Use the full protocol before staging: re-check active claims/queue/comms, open short-lived git:index/head claim, enqueue a commit intent, then stage only this explicit WS1.4 product pathspec bundle:
packages/core/graph-core/package.json
packages/core/graph-core/src/index.ts
packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/index.ts
packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/processor.ts
packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/processor.unit.test.ts
packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/processor.integration.test.ts
packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/remote-context.ts
packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/runtime.ts
pnpm-lock.yaml

Do not stage broad collaboration-state residue in the implementation commit. After commit, complete queue, close WS1.4/file/git claims, then report commit SHA and any remaining closeout residue so I can route a small closeout commit if needed.
